name: GOLFTEC El Segundo
address: 630 N Pacific Coast Hwy #13b, El Segundo, CA 90245
about: GOLFTEC is a golf training studio specializing in data-driven instruction and club fitting. They utilize advanced technology like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide personalized coaching and club fitting services. Their approach is designed to help golfers of all skill levels improve their swing mechanics and game strategy through a structured, technology-enhanced learning environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology for precise swing analysis and feedback
Certified PGA coaches providing personalized improvement plans
Comprehensive club fitting with data-driven optimization
Indoor simulator bays for practice and play in any weather
Structured lesson programs for measurable skill development

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, GOLFTEC provides clubs for lessons and fittings. They also offer club fitting services to help you find the perfect equipment for your game.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are mentioned as being allowed at GOLFTEC locations.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: This information is not specified on the website, as GOLFTEC focuses on lessons and practice rather than full 18-hole simulator play.

faq.question: Is GOLFTEC kid-friendly for junior golfers?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers instruction and technology suitable for junior golfers, with programs designed for younger players to learn and improve their game.
